# LEAD_GEN_INTELLIGENCE — Autonomous Lead Intelligence Platform
> Repository: https://github.com/InfinityXOneSystems/LEAD_GEN_INTELLIGENCE
> Owner: InfinityXOneSystems
> License: ISC

## What This Project Does
LEAD_GEN_INTELLIGENCE is a fully autonomous, open-source lead intelligence platform for the
flooring and construction industries. It discovers contractor leads, validates & enriches contact
data, scores prospects, automates outreach, and surfaces everything in a real-time Next.js dashboard.

## Key Capabilities
- **Scraping**: Google Maps, Bing Maps, Yelp, contractor directories, social media (LinkedIn, X/Twitter, Facebook, Instagram)
- **Validation**: deduplication, phone/website reachability checks, scoring (0–100 scale)
- **Enrichment**: email discovery, LinkedIn profiles, additional contact details
- **Lead Scoring**: weighted rules engine (website +10, email +15, phone +10, reviews>10 +5, rating>4 +10)
- **Outreach**: Nodemailer automated email, follow-up scheduler, campaign management
- **Dashboard**: Next.js PWA, pure-black + electric-gold theme, collapsible sidebar, analytics, AI command chat panel
- **Headless REST API Agent**: Playwright-powered browser automation with form fill, scroll, type, click, screenshot, page navigation, parallel instances, and sandbox isolation
- **Social Media Scraping**: LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Facebook, Instagram company & business page scraping
- **Autonomous Pipeline**: GitHub Actions every 4 hours — Scrape → Validate → Enrich → Score → Store → Deploy

## Technology Stack
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, Crawlee, Playwright, Selenium WebDriver, Steel SDK
- **AI / Automation**: GitHub Copilot Agents, GitHub Actions, GPT Actions (OpenAPI 3.1)
- **Queue**: BullMQ-compatible task queue (scraper_queue.js)
- **Database**: PostgreSQL (pg), SQLite (better-sqlite3)
- **Frontend**: Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, PWA, Service Workers
- **Python**: asyncio, selenium, pyppeteer for parallel headless automation

## File Map
- `agents/headless/` — Headless REST API agent (Playwright + asyncio parallel instances)
- `agents/orchestrator/` — System orchestrator + Infinity Orchestrator GitHub App handler
- `agents/scoring/` — Lead scoring engine
- `agents/outreach/` — Email outreach automation
- `scrapers/` — All scraper implementations (Google Maps, Bing, social media)
- `scrapers/social/` — Social media scrapers (LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Facebook, Instagram)
- `sandbox/` — Sandboxed execution environment for headless agent
- `validation/` — Lead validation pipeline
- `dashboard/` — Next.js PWA dashboard (app router)
- `pages/` — Static GitHub Pages dashboard
- `agents/gpt_actions/` — OpenAPI 3.1 spec + Express server for GPT Actions
- `.github/workflows/` — All CI/CD automation workflows
- `.github/app/` — GitHub App manifest (Infinity Orchestrator)
- `db/` — Database schema and lead store
- `outreach/` — Outreach engine, follow-up scheduler, templates

## API Endpoints (GPT Actions server on port 3100)
- GET  /status          — System health
- GET  /leads           — List leads (filterable)
- POST /scrape          — Trigger scraping job
- POST /validate        — Run validation pipeline
- POST /score           — Run scoring pipeline
- POST /outreach        — Send outreach emails
- GET  /analytics       — Lead analytics summary

## Headless Agent API (port 3200)
- POST /agent/session/create   — Create browser session
- POST /agent/fill             — Fill a form field
- POST /agent/click            — Click an element
- POST /agent/type             — Type text
- POST /agent/scroll           — Scroll the page
- POST /agent/screenshot       — Capture screenshot
- POST /agent/navigate         — Navigate to URL
- DELETE /agent/session/:id    — Close session
- GET  /agent/sessions         — List active sessions

## Social Media Scrapers
- `scrapers/social/linkedin_scraper.js` — Company pages, employee listings
- `scrapers/social/twitter_scraper.js` — Business profiles, posts
- `scrapers/social/facebook_scraper.js` — Business pages, contact info
- `scrapers/social/instagram_scraper.js` — Business accounts, contact info
- `scrapers/social/social_scraper_engine.js` — Orchestrates all social scrapers

## Running the Platform
```
npm run pipeline          # score + export
npm run generate-city-leads
npm run gpt-actions       # GPT Actions API server
node agents/headless/headless_agent.js   # Headless REST API (port 3200)
node scrapers/social/social_scraper_engine.js
```
